parsed_profile.narrative_structure: Multi-threaded sequential plot handling with geographic and character group transitions; omnicient third-person narration maintaining comfortable distance from any single consciousness
parsed_profile.pacing_mechanism: Alternates extended explanatory passages with short urgent declaratives; final paragraphs accelerate into clipped threat rhythm
parsed_profile.chapter_function_model: Transitional chapters resolve one character arc while launching another; physical separation of plot threads handled sequentially within single chapters
parsed_profile.hook_delivery_pattern: External threat introduction through urgent messengers and pursuers rather than internal character conflict; chapter-ending alarm creates external pressure

reader_promise: A sweeping narrative where virtuous characters survive through cleverness and divine intervention; the reader anticipates resolution of identity mysteries, family reunions, and the eventual exposure or triumph of deception threads, all delivered through formal elegant prose that honors classical Chinese literary conventions
core_engine: Disguise-and-survival mechanism driven by virtue signaling; multiple concurrent plot threads managed through geographic transition and sequential handling; found family formation through crisis adoption; divine rescue as moral vindication for female virtue
state_variables: {'deception_thread': 'Active deception involving false noble identity, currently successful but vulnerable to future exposure', 'family_structure': 'Newly formed adoptive family unit replacing lost biological connections, bond not yet solidified', 'threat_level': 'External authority (implied Dang Gong summons) creating urgent danger, nature of accusation unknown', 'missing_parent': 'Real father of heroine still unfound, creating open reunion potential'}
reader_rewards: Survival confirmation for characters in presumed danger
Character chemistry establishment between protagonist and new family
risk_patterns: {'pattern': 'multiple_distinct_plot_threads_in_single_chapter', 'severity': 'medium', 'mitigation': 'Clear transition signals and sequential handling reduce diffusion'}
{'pattern': 'divine_rescue_from_suicide', 'severity': 'medium', 'audience_note': 'May discomfort readers uncomfortable with religious intervention framing'}
{'pattern': 'adoption_solution_as_avoidance', 'severity': 'low', 'audience_note': 'Crisis resolution through new family may read as deferral rather than resolution'}
{'pattern': 'generic_threat_hook', 'severity': 'low', 'mitigation': 'Lacks specificity without knowing nature of Dang Gong accusation'}
{'pattern': 'female_characters_defined_by_domestic_virtue', 'severity': 'medium', 'audience_note': 'Character agency limited to family roles may feel restrictive to modern readers'}
distillation_notes: Only one chapter card (abs_chapter_no 82) produced valid JSON; two chapter cards and both volume cards remain fallback due to LLM structure issues. Design patterns extracted from valid chapter card provide reasonable foundation but volume-level aggregation incomplete.
